hull_structure.desc: PETG thin shell 1.2mm wall — print as open shell sections
hull_structure.notes: Print 6 sections. Insert cable-route straws before assembly.

hull_structure.desc: X-30 expanding PU foam 2 lb/ft³ (0.032 g/cm³) — pour into shell voids
hull_structure.notes: 2-part, 2-min pot life, 4× expansion. Net foam vol 1309 cm³ after 18% internals deduction.
3mm CF plate keel + 2mm ring frames at 5 stations
Insert before foam pour. Routes: CAN, RS-485, 1553, ETH×2, power

hull_structure.desc: EPS blue foam board 25mm × 300mm × 150mm — void former material
hull_structure.notes: Owens Corning Foamular 150 or equivalent. Cut to 6 void-former shapes per build guide step 22.

hull_structure.desc: Johnson's Paste Wax 16oz tin — void-former release agent
hull_structure.notes: Consumed, not airborne weight. Apply 2 coats to all EPS void-former surfaces before foam pour.

hull_structure.desc: PTFE tube 5mm OD × 3mm ID × 2.5m — cable conduit through foam
hull_structure.notes: 6 conduits: CAN, RS-485, 1553, ETH-A, ETH-B, PWR. Install before foam pour. Total 12g stays in airframe.

hull_structure.desc: Access panel frame set — PETG 100% infill, 2mm wall — 6 frames + 6 lids
hull_structure.notes: Print from access_panel_frames.stl (TBD). Bond frames into hull with 5-min epoxy before foam pour. Lids are removable.

hull_structure.desc: M2.5×6 SS button-head Phillips — access panel screws
hull_structure.notes: 4 per panel for panels B and E. Panels A and F use bayonet. Panel C uses hinge. Panel D uses magnets.

hull_structure.desc: N42 neodymium disc magnet 6×2mm — panel D magnetic closure
hull_structure.notes: 4 in panel frame + 4 in panel lid. Press-fit into 6.1mm printed pockets.
Line all panel frame lips before foam pour. Provides dust/moisture seal and prevents foam intrusion into void.
Consumed during build. Bond access-panel frames into hull sections before foam pour step.

propulsion.notes: Mounted in engine bell section 83-100% station. Variable-area nozzle (BamJr remix CC BY 4.0). 6S direct-connect to main bus — no voltage conversion needed.

sourcing.notes: Generic 40mm 6S EDF unit; verify 22.2V rating before install

propulsion.desc: 50A BLHeli32 ESC for 80mm nacelle EDF — 6S rated
30A BLHeli32 ESC for 40mm fuselage EDF — 6S rated
propulsion.notes: Direct 6S feed from main PDB bus. Replaces 25A 4S ESC. Eliminates need for 4S BEC/step-down on PDB.

nacelle_hardware.desc: Nacelle pod shell PETG — 80mm ID, 93.5mm OD, 144mm long
Nacelle tip cap PORT — RED WS2812C nav light recess
Nacelle tip cap STBD — GREEN WS2812C nav light recess
CF stub arm 12mm OD 1.5mm wall 10.4mm long
MG90S nacelle tilt servo — 120° bracket modification
nacelle_hardware.notes: 50Hz PWM. Travel extended to 120° via bracket geometry: 0°=VTOL, 90°=fwd flight, 120°=reverse thrust (30° past horizontal). MG90S physical range supports this; bracket hard-stop at 120°. FC soft-limits: 0–90° normal mode, 90–115° reverse/brake mode.

nacelle_hardware.desc: Gear nozzle assembly — sector gear + ring + 8 flaps (BamJr CC BY 4.0)
nacelle_hardware.notes: 2 nacelle + 1 fuselage. Sector gear drives ring via bevel chain.

avionics_nodes.desc: Raspberry Pi CM4 Lite (no eMMC) — Nodes 1 & 4
avionics_nodes.notes: Nodes 1 (flight ctrl) and 4 (actuator ctrl). Full PCIe, GbE, USB3.
CPLD write-blocker, 2× microSD, USB-C, 40-pin GPIO. Nodes 1 & 4.

avionics_nodes.desc: SENSORHAT-1 PCB 46×36mm 4L — XIAO RP2350 realtime co-processor
Raspberry Pi CM3+ Lite (no eMMC) — Nodes 2 & 3
avionics_nodes.notes: 200-pin SODIMM. A53@1.2GHz, LPDDR2 1GB max. USB2-attached GbE via CM3-CARRIER-1 W5500. microSD boot via carrier J_SD slot.

sourcing.supplier: Raspberry Pi approved resellers (Adafruit, PiShop, OKdo)

avionics_nodes.desc: CM3-CARRIER-1 PCB 68×30mm 4L — integrated bus I/O carrier
avionics_nodes.notes: 200-pin SODIMM socket, 40-pin RPi HAT header, JST-GH: CAN FD 4-pin / RS-485 4-pin / 1553B 4-pin / ETH-SPI 6-pin. MCP2518FD+ATA6561, MAX3485E, HI-6130, W5500, CH340C USB-UART, AP2112K-3.3 LDO, CAT24C32 HAT EEPROM. Nodes 2 & 3 — replaces CARRIER-2+SENSORHAT-1+MICROHAT stack.
KSZ8895 5-port ETH switch, SiK 915MHz, HI-6130 1553 RT, CAN FD, RS-485, TPM. Node 1 only.

avionics_nodes.desc: MICROHAT PCB 42×36mm — Node 4 minimal comms hat
avionics_nodes.notes: Ethernet passthrough, CAN FD, RS-485, 1553 connectors only. Node 4 only (Nodes 2 & 3 use CM3-CARRIER-1 integrated bus ports).
2× for CM4-CARRIER-2 (N1,N4), 2× for CM3-CARRIER-1 J_SD slot (N2,N3)
One per CM4-CARRIER-2 log slot (Nodes 1 & 4). CM3 nodes log via ETH to Node 1.

wiring.desc: Power distribution board — XT90 main + 3× ESC outputs + 5V BEC bus
Ethernet 6-pin JST-GH 200mm cables — Murex switch to nodes
PWR + I2C + misc short cables, connectors, zip ties

payload_system.desc: SG90 payload release / winch control servo
payload_system.notes: Controls winch motor direction and brake via DRV8833

payload_system.desc: SG90 clamshell cargo door actuator servo
payload_system.notes: Drives push-pull bell-crank that opens/closes both clamshell door halves simultaneously. Spring-assist opening, servo pull-close.

payload_system.desc: N20 6V DC winch motor — 300:1 gear ratio
payload_system.notes: 300:1 gearing gives ~8N lift capacity for 250g cargo + cradle mass. Spool holds 1.5m of 0.5mm Dyneema SK75 line.

payload_system.desc: Cargo bay gondola shell PETG — 112×85×22mm belly pod
payload_system.notes: Replaces flat belly panel. Interior 101.6×76.2×76.2mm (4"×3"×3"). Belly pod protrudes 18mm below hull line — screen-accurate Serenity cargo module profile. Bonds to hull sections B and C with 5-min epoxy.

payload_system.desc: Clamshell cargo door halves PETG — 2× mirrored halves
payload_system.notes: Each half hinges on 3mm CF pin at gondola centreline. Spring-loaded to open; SG90 linkage closes and latches. Seal lip with 1.5mm closed-cell foam tape.

payload_system.desc: Cargo cradle + auto-latch PETG — accepts 4"×3"×3" box
payload_system.notes: Suspended on Dyneema line from winch. Spring-loaded corner clips auto-latch around box when cradle reaches top of bay. Unlatches when cradle descends 5mm (gravity + detent). Two-axis levelling rods keep load stable during winch traverse.
Break strength 80N. Attach to cradle eyelet with double-bowline. Wind 1.5m onto spool, reserve 0.5m slack.

obstacle_avoidance.desc: Array A — ST VL53L5CX 8×8 multizone ToF sensors — Node 3, Panel D
obstacle_avoidance.notes: S1A Forward sta 25mm, S2A Aft sta 440mm, S3A Port sta 200mm, S4A Stbd sta 200mm, S5A Zenith sta 180mm, S6A Nadir sta 160mm. Each flush-mounted behind 5mm PMMA window. I2C bus: Node 3 I2C3.
I2C address 0x70. Channels 0–5 select S1A–S6A. Shared PCB with MCP23008-A. Node 3 I2C3 (Panel D).

obstacle_avoidance.desc: Array A — MCP23008 8-port I2C GPIO expander — XSHUT control
obstacle_avoidance.notes: I2C address 0x20. GP0–GP5 drive XSHUT for S1A–S6A. Boot: all low → enable one, assign 0x54–0x59, disable. Node 3 I2C3 (Panel D).
Press-fit 6.5mm hull cutout. 0.5mm PMMA disc UV-adhesive over aperture.
Route through foam conduit to Panel D bay. GND/VCC/SDA/SCL.

obstacle_avoidance.desc: Array B — ST VL53L5CX 8×8 multizone ToF sensors — Node 2, Panel B
obstacle_avoidance.notes: S1B Forward sta 40mm, S2B Aft sta 425mm, S3B Port sta 150mm, S4B Stbd sta 150mm, S5B Zenith sta 260mm, S6B Nadir sta 220mm. Spatially offset from Array A for different blind-spot profiles. I2C bus: Node 2 I2C2.
I2C address 0x70 on Node 2 I2C2 — electrically isolated from Array A bus. Channels 0–5 select S1B–S6B. Panel B bay.

obstacle_avoidance.desc: Array B — MCP23008 8-port I2C GPIO expander — XSHUT control
obstacle_avoidance.notes: I2C address 0x20 on Node 2 I2C2. GP0–GP5 drive XSHUT for S1B–S6B. Boot sequence identical to Array A but on separate bus. Panel B bay.
Same print as Array A mounts. Different hull cutout positions per Array B station offsets.
Route through separate foam conduit to Panel B bay. Do NOT commingle with Array A harness.

radios_sensors.desc: u-blox M10Q GPS module + patch antenna

fasteners_misc.desc: 3M double-sided foam tape — vibration isolation mounts

cargo_bay.gondola_note: 18mm belly pod protrusion below hull line — matches Serenity cargo module profile
cargo_bay.door_type: clamshell (2 halves fold down, SG90-actuated bell-crank)
cargo_bay.cradle_type: auto-latch PETG corner clips — no manual attachment needed

nacelle_tilt.servo: MG90S (unchanged) — bracket geometry modified for 120° travel
nacelle_tilt.lift_at_115deg: nacelle thrust × cos(25°) × 2 = 1700 × 0.906 × 2 = 3080g lift — sufficient for hover with reduced payload
nacelle_tilt.datum: 0deg = longitudinal axis (forward flight); +theta = aft rotation toward VTOL

obstacle_avoidance_notes.redundancy: Each array independently provides full omnidirectional coverage. Single node failure leaves other array active with no coverage gap.

positions.S1B_forward: station 40mm — nose ring aft of S1A
positions.S2B_aft: station 425mm — engine bell fore of S2A
positions.S3B_port: station 150mm — port hull, fwd of S3A
positions.S4B_stbd: station 150mm — stbd hull, fwd of S4A
positions.S5B_zenith: station 260mm — dorsal keel, aft of S5A

obstacle_avoidance_notes.i2c_mux: TCA9548A ch 0–5 (one per array, same address 0x70 on isolated buses)
obstacle_avoidance_notes.xshut_gpio: MCP23008 GP0–GP5 (one per array, same address 0x20 on isolated buses)
obstacle_avoidance_notes.aperture: 5mm PMMA disc flush-mount — looks like hull porthole

total_auw_g.note: EPS void formers and wax consumed during build. Rev I adds dual obstacle avoidance arrays (+30g: Array-B sensors/PCB/mounts) and upgrades fuselage ESC 4S→6S (+4g). 40mm EDF now direct-connect 6S. Total dry +34g vs single-array build.
total_auw_g.note_cargo: Use 6S 1800mAh (180g) for T/W>2.0 on cargo missions. 2800mAh gives T/W 1.91 — acceptable for slow indoor cargo ops.

build_notes.void_former_material: 25mm EPS blue foam board, waxed with Johnson's Paste Wax

cm3_carrier_1_notes.cm_interface: 200-pin DDR2-SODIMM 0.6mm pitch — JEDEC MO-224 (TE 1473005-4 or equiv)
cm3_carrier_1_notes.hat_header: 40-pin 2×20 2.54mm RPi HAT standard — accepts COMPHAT / COMM-HAT

jst_gh_ports.J_CAN: 4-pin — GND / VCC / CANH / CANL — MCP2518FD + ATA6561
jst_gh_ports.J_1553: 4-pin — GND / shield / BUS_A+ / BUS_A- — HI-6130 LQFP-80
jst_gh_ports.J_ETH: 6-pin — GND / VCC / SCK / MISO / MOSI / CS — W5500 LQFP-48

cm3_carrier_1_notes.power: USB-C 5V in — AP2112K-3.3 LDO 600mA for 3.3V rail
cm3_carrier_1_notes.debug: CH340C USB-UART bridge on J_USBC — no crystal required
cm3_carrier_1_notes.storage: microSD push-push for CM3+ Lite OS boot
cm3_carrier_1_notes.hat_eeprom: CAT24C32WI 4Kbit I²C at 0x50 on ID_SD/ID_SC pins
capability_delta_vs_cm4: Ethernet via W5500 SPI (hardware TCP/IP) — not native GbE — adequate for 100BASE-T node traffic
USB 2.0 max (CM3+ has no USB 3.0 or PCIe)
A53@1.2GHz vs A72@1.5GHz — ~50% single-thread regression; acceptable for nav/payload nodes
LPDDR2 max 1GB vs CM4 8GB max — sufficient for Node 2 (nav) and Node 3 (payload)
No CPLD write-blocker (CM3-CARRIER-1 omits MachXO2 — lower threat model for N2/N3)
cm3_carrier_1_notes.notes: CM3-CARRIER-1 replaces 3-board stack (CM4-CARRIER-2 + SENSORHAT-1 + MICROHAT = ~39g) with single 9g board + 8g CM3+ module = 17g. Total system saving 60g.
